# MatchUp

> UK combat sports matchmaking platform connecting fighters, coaches/gyms, and event organisers for MMA and Muay Thai.

MatchUp helps fighters find bouts, coaches manage rosters, and organisers build fight cards. Explore events, fighter profiles, and gyms across the UK.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and how MatchUp works.
- [Events](/explore/events): Upcoming MMA and Muay Thai events across the UK.
- [Fighters](/explore/fighters): Active fighters by weight class, style, and availability.
- [Gyms](/explore/gyms): Combat sports gyms with disciplines and coaches.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account as a fighter, coach, or organiser.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the MatchUp team.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Record Accuracy Policy](/record-accuracy)
- [Advertise](/advertise)
